seo.title: Lumen Wellness Studio — Yoga, Meditation & Breathwork in Bengaluru
seo.description: A neighbourhood wellness studio offering guided yoga, meditation, and breathwork sessions for everyday balance.

hero.headline: Slow down. Breathe. Begin again.
hero.tagline: Guided yoga, meditation and breathwork in the heart of Indiranagar.

about.description: Lumen Wellness Studio is a quiet, light-filled space dedicated to mindful movement and restorative practice. Our certified instructors guide small groups through traditional and modern wellness disciplines — built around the rhythms of everyday life.

services.title: Hatha Yoga
services.description: Foundational asana and alignment classes for all levels, held in small groups of up to ten.

services.title: Meditation Sessions
services.description: Guided seated and walking meditation drawing from mindfulness and Vedic traditions.

services.title: Breathwork Workshops
services.description: Weekend pranayama workshops focused on practical techniques for stress and energy.

services.title: Wellness Consultations
services.description: One-on-one informational sessions to help you choose a practice that fits your routine.

images.alt: Mats laid out in the practice room
images.caption: The practice room

images.alt: Meditation cushion in soft afternoon light
images.caption: Meditation corner

items.title: Small group sizes
items.description: Never more than ten people per class — every session feels personal.

items.title: Certified instructors
items.description: Our teachers carry international 200- and 500-hour certifications.

items.title: Natural light & airflow
items.description: Our studio is built around two skylights and a quiet inner courtyard.

items.title: All experience levels
items.description: From first-timers to long-time practitioners — every class is layered.

steps.title: Reach out
steps.description: Send us a message or call to learn about current schedules and openings.

steps.title: Visit the studio
steps.description: Come in for a free orientation — meet the instructors and see the space.

steps.title: Begin your practice
steps.description: Choose a class that fits your week and start at your own pace.

compliance.disclaimer: The information on this website is intended for general awareness only and does not constitute medical, therapeutic, or professional health advice. Please consult a qualified practitioner before beginning any new wellness practice.
